sentences.text: The doctor treats patients in the hospital every day.
She listens carefully to people's problems.
She checks temperature and heartbeat.
She gives medicine after examining the patient.
Doctors work hard to save lives.
They stay calm during emergencies.
Doctors are important because they keep us healthy.
The teacher guides students in the classroom.
She explains difficult lessons clearly.
She answers questions patiently.
Students listen carefully during class.
She checks homework after school.
Teachers encourage children to do their best.
A good teacher shapes our future.
The police officer protects people in the city.
He controls traffic at busy roads.
He catches criminals who break the law.
He helps people during emergencies.
Police officers work day and night.
They wear uniforms and carry badges.
They keep society safe and peaceful.
Firefighters rush quickly when a fire breaks out.
They drive large red fire trucks.
They spray water to stop the flames.
They rescue people trapped inside buildings.
They wear special safety gear.
Firefighters are brave and strong.
They protect lives and property.
The farmer works hard in the fields.
He plants seeds during the planting season.
He waters crops regularly.
He harvests fruits and vegetables.
Farmers wake up early every morning.
They care for animals on the farm.
Farmers provide food for everyone.
The postman delivers letters and parcels daily.
He rides a bicycle or drives a van.
He sorts mail before starting work.
He knocks on doors politely.
People wait for important letters.
He works in all kinds of weather.
Postmen help people stay connected.
The nurse cares for patients in hospitals.
She checks blood pressure and temperature.
She helps doctors during treatment.
She gives medicines on time.
She speaks gently to comfort patients.
Nurses work long hours.
They play an important role in healthcare.
The shopkeeper sells items in the store.
He arranges products neatly on shelves.
He helps customers find what they need.
He gives the correct change.
He keeps records of sales.
Customers visit the shop daily.
Shopkeepers make shopping easy.
The driver transports passengers safely.
He follows traffic rules carefully.
He stops at signals and bus stops.
He checks the vehicle before driving.
Passengers trust the driver.
Drivers stay alert on busy roads.
They help people reach their destinations.
The cleaner keeps streets and parks tidy.
He sweeps roads every morning.
He collects garbage carefully.
He works hard to maintain cleanliness.
He wears gloves and a uniform.
Clean surroundings keep people healthy.
Cleaners improve our community life.
